column1: Hey Elizabeth, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Dope yea Punta is lit for sure. thats where I'll be too
how many ppl in your group so far?
Okay cool, just lookin for some info for now?
hey gonna send you over this info, whats the best email for you?
epericat@icloud.com Question: if I get a group together, can I go for free?
Yea we have our group leader program, if you have a group of 15+ youd qualify for a free stay
gonna send the options over rn!
sent that over did it come through?
Yes. Thank you:) Would you be able to give me prices for flights from Boston to Punta Cana 3/14-3/19 (5-night) and Boston to Cancun 3/16-3/20 (4-night)?
yea so flights are def cheaper to get separately on your own! I can help you find a good flight to buy tho, like on the side
for the 14-19th, the base pricing will be the same as the 5 night option in the email. and the 16-20th pricing will be the same as the 4 night link in the email
heres a good Jet Blue flight for the 14-19 https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/brXuevFvLL83my3n7
heres a good one for March 16-20 https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/V4BAAnwEP6jGsMwS8

Ok. I did some looking into flights but I wasn't sure if you would get better pricing. Also, I was thinking of sending a group text/link to the whole group that people could just click on and get everything all in one place.
Those links are helpful. Thank you!
Ahh okay got you. We can def do flights and have it all in one link for you but you'll save 150-200 going the route of getting them separately
So it'll be 2 links, but will still be pretty simple!
Could you send or email me a link with just the Occidental Punta Cana 3/14-3/18 quote? I want to forward it to my group and see who's interested.
Yea I'll text in a sec!
Can you send me a link for 14-19 too? Thank you for your help
yea no prob. here it is https://secure.gobluetours.com/site/public/booking-quotes/PY7DQZVODY
heyy Elizabeth whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?

I've been talking to my people and looking at flights. I'm trying to get people to make a decision because the flight prices will change. Since Cancun is the most affordable for people I've been looking up flights from Boston to Cancun and found a good one for the 3/16-3/21 dates. If you got the flights would it be a guaranteed price? I know that if we get our own airfare, the prices go up the longer people wait to decide.
Its def best to get flights separately on your own, I would just get them soon as possible before prices go up
with us, we can guarantee the same price for everyone if we do it in one package, but youll save like 150-200 getting them on your own
Ok. Thanks for letting me know.
yea no prob. if you need help looking for flights just let me know
Just wondering. Do you have a Cancun trip 3/15-3/19
yea we can do 15-19, did i send that over as an option? if not i can send it rn
we can do really any dates, whatever works best for you
The Cancun dates you gave me were 3/16-3/20 and 3/16-3/21
ok gotcha, yea the pricing for the 15-19 will be the same as the 16-20
I was looking at different flight options and I used 15-19 which had some good flights.
ok dope yea we can do the 15-19, 4 night pricing will stay the same
Ok. I will let you know if I need you to send a quote. Thank you.
cool lmk, def want to get you guys situated inventory is running slim
Liked “cool lmk, def want to get you guys situated inventory is running slim”
Hi Spiffy, I was talking to my people and if you don't mind could you send me a link with the Cancun itinerary for 3/15-3/19 so I could forward it to the group? Thank you so much!
this is just a sample quote, did you want me to get a reservation set up?
This is great. I will let you know when I need a reservation set up to text the group.
I think we are going to move forward. Can you please get a reservation set up for my group for that Cancun 3/15-3/19 (Grand Oasis resort) trip so I can forward it to my friends. Thank you.
okay yea sounds good. I'll get that started now, each person can follow the link, set up their own slot, and make their own deposit
how many ppl did we want to start with?
okay cool lets do it. were the 4 of you ready to deposit tonight to secure things?
Two are ready. Two may take a little bit. Trying to get them moving! How does it get set up in the rooms if we decide on 2 rooms?
okay cool I hear you. I'll set it for 4 in a room anyway, we can get the two settled in, and the other two can settle in afterward
if we end up doing 2 rooms, we'll just add a 2nd room to the reservation as long as we have the availability
np lmk if you need any help navigating through
Liked “np lmk if you need any help navigating through”

Can you change it to say Booking leader: Andrew Pericat? I've been coordinating this for my son and his friends. I think my son would preferred to have his name on it than mine. It's OK if you don't get it until tomorrow.

Hi spiffy, I have two requests if you don't mind. Can you send a reservation linked for the Krystal resort instead of Oasis (same dates 3/15-3/19) and put the deposit deadline as 1/30? We know they have to make a decision as soon as possible, but it just gives them a day to make it happen. We don't want to have people panic that they have to do it right this second. We know the Krystal resort is a little more expensive but my son was reading some reviews of the oasis and got a little concerned. Thank you for your help.

Hi good morning. no worries we can make the switch. I will say, the Grand Oasis does have some harsh reviews since its so commonly traveled by many different types of people with different preferences. overall, its a college party resort. Most college students that are there arent there for top level amenities, they typically just want to party. some of the reviews are from people that didnt know that coming in and had other expectations
personally, I do stay a the Krystal when I'm in Cancun. just because of my personal preference. but the Grand Oasis is definitely a good party scene for college students more than the krystal is
Good to know. These guys aren't huge partiers so Krystal is probably more their speed anyhow.
I just checked and unfort there is a slight chance we no longer have krystal accommodations available for those dates. I just put the manual request in now with our operations team
hi! would you be able to do the 16th to 20th? we just dont have the 15th date available anymore
okay sounds good. we'll do that instead. will send over a new reservation
Hi heres your new reservation. will also email this over shortly https://secure.gobluetours.com/site/public/package/CWGXFEQPQR
I checked it out and it looks like you're expecting full payment. Is there a way they could do a deposit and break it into a couple payments, even if they're 10 days apart?
That'll be adjusted. Same payment schedule as the original one
Hi Elizabeth! Let me know if the boys need any help getting on the reservation today
They will be making their decision today. That's what they told me.
Gotcha. deciding between the two resorts?
Okay no prob. if they need any advice or recommendation let me know. happy to help talk it through
Hi Elizabeth, any update from the boys? I wont be able to keep both reservations open for much longer unfortunately

Hi!!! Thank you for your message. They finally booked their airline tickets last night for March 16 to March 20. They are waiting on a decision from one other person who was going to get back to them today. I know they will use the reservation for the Krystal. I'm not sure if it will be three people or four people. It will definitely be three. We're getting there. . . Thank you so much. Now that they have their flights I'm confident they will secure the reservation. I will let them know that they need to act soon. You definitely do not have to keep the reservation for the oasis. Thank you so much! I appreciate all your effort immensely and the follow up!

By the way 😊 I don't know if you worked for the company or are an independent travel agent, but your efforts should be highly commended!! If you are employed by the company, please pass on my comments about the amazing service you have provided us.
Thats amazing thank you so much!
Reacted ☺️ to “that really means a lot”
Hi Elizabeth! I see the boys got in on the reservation. happy to be able to help. Let me know if any questions come up over the next few days

I'm happy for them that they were able to move things forward!! Thanks again for your help! I know it says in the description that someone will be there on location. Any chance you're the one that's going to be there?
I'm assigned in Punta Cana this year so sadly I won't. but our team is super awesome and will take care of the boys when they land
Loved “I'm assigned in Punta Cana this year so sadly I won't. but our team is super awesome and will take care of the boys when they land”
Hey Elizabeth! Do you know if Jack, Brady, and Lucas are on the same flight as Andrew?
And also did anyone want to purchase and of the party package events?
